name: Double Delicious Cookie Bar
recipeIngredient: 14 oz. Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). For a glass dish, set temperature to 325°F (165°C).
2. Use a 13 x 9 inch baking pan.
3. Melt the butter in the preheated oven.
4. Sprinkle graham cracker crumbs over the melted butter.
5. Pour the condensed milk over the crumbs.
6. Top with chocolate chips and peanut butter chips, pressing down firmly.
7. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes.
8. Allow to cool, then cut into bars.
9. Store loosely covered at room temperature.
